caption: Two men are seated in a room in front of a television, reacting to a video. One man on the left wears a dark grey t-shirt and maintains a neutral, slightly skeptical expression. The man on the right wears a grey t-shirt and a necklace, appearing to smile or smirk while resting his chin on his hand. Above them, glowing orange text reads "OUR STUPID REACTIONS". The background includes a shelf of DVDs and a small plant. A smaller inset video screen displays scenes from a cinematic production. Throughout the sequence, the two men remain in their positions with minimal shifts in expression, while the content of the inset video changes from a dark scene with figures, to a close-up of a character in armor, to a shot of a stone archway, and finally to a wide shot of a large castle fortification with several figures standing outside. White subtitles at the bottom of the inset screen consistently read, "What if it was just serendipity that made me who I am?".
